use_when: Progressively guide a Commander or Executor from available capabilities to one workflow and then specific inputs, defaults, outputs, or constraints like root and subcommand --help
excludes: Direct requests to initialize or change configuration, or create a report without asking for usage guidance

use_when: Initialize or reset iceberg-code-report configuration before use
excludes: Inspecting or changing individual settings, or creating a code report

use_when: Inspect or update iceberg-code-report output directory, path format, or timezone settings
excludes: Resetting all settings to defaults, or creating a code report

use_when: Create or resolve a directory for a new code report bundle, including the first phase of a full report request
excludes: Writing report content, modifying configuration, or using an existing report directory

use_when: Write the main __summary__.md for a code report, codebase tour, technical orientation, architecture explanation, or code reading guide
excludes: Creating only a directory, writing component detail documents, configuration management, code changes, or refactoring advice

use_when: Write requested component detail documents for an existing code report summary
excludes: Writing a summary or creating a directory, detailing unspecified components, configuration management, code changes, or refactoring advice
